revision.comment: [[Category:Anti-religious sentiment]]
revision.text:
This category is for issues relating to Anti-Buddhism. It [[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Log/2011 February 9#Bias categories|must not]] include articles about individuals, groups or media that are allegedly anti-Buddhist.
[[Category:Anti-religious sentiment|Buddhism]] [[Category:History of Buddhism]] [[Category:Criticism of Buddhism]]

Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "

Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)

revision.text:
==Old Content== This category is for issues relating to Anti-Buddhism. It include articles about individuals, groups or media that are allegedly anti-Buddhist.
==Categories==
[[en:Anti-Buddhism]] [[en:Category:Anti-Buddhism]] [[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Log/2011 February 9Bias categories|must not]] {{wikidata link|Q8255439}} [[Category:Anti-religious sentiment|Buddhism]] [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Criticism of Buddhism]] [[Category:History of Buddhism]] [[Category:Original categories]]
